original_code:
module TopModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire data_in,
    output reg [3:0] q
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            q <= {q[2:0], data_in};
        end
    end
endmodule
